{{Quote|A dalyrake. They're more common on Talus than Corellia, but, as you can see, they can be found here, as well.|[[Dusque Mistflier]], to [[Finn Darktrin]]|<ref name="TRoD" />}}
'''Dalyrakes''' were a large arachnoid species from [[Talus/Legends|Talus]].

==Biology and appearance==
{{Quote|They can live on land or in the water indefinitely. What they do quite often is find a solid perch near water and dangle in their front two arms as lures. They wait for some unsuspecting fish to swim by and spear it with their venomous talons.|Dusque Mistflier, to Finn Darktrin|<ref name="TRoD" />}}
Dalyrakes were multi-limbed<ref name="SWG" /> arachnoids<ref name="SWG:D" /> native to Talus, but also prevalent on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]]. They lived both on land and in [[Water/Legends|water]], using two of their stalk-tentacles as lures for food animals, stabbing them with a poison barb when they approached.<ref name="TRoD" /> They primarily ate [[Fish/Legends|fish]], small [[Reptavian/Legends|reptavians]], and [[tabage]].<ref name="SWG:D" /> If cut, their hides secreted black toxin. When they died, they instinctively lunged as a form of death-spasm.<ref name="TRoD" />

Their meat was considered a delicacy.<ref name="SWG:D" />

A subspecies larger than the common dalyrakes was the giant dalyrake.<ref name="SWG" />

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:Dalyrake_concept_art.jpg|thumb|right|220px|Concept art for ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]''.]]
Dalyrakes appeared in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref>
